ui.contact_intro: Available for an apprenticeship in wealth management. I would be delighted to discuss how my background can serve your clients.

cv_objective: Seeking an apprenticeship position in a wealth management firm, where I can develop my knowledge of financial advisory, asset management, client portfolio support, and patrimonial strategy while applying my strong background in real estate, client relations, and commercial advisory.
professional_profile:
Motivated and client-oriented, I have developed strong experience in real estate, banking, commercial advisory, and high-end client support. 
My academic and professional background has given me a solid understanding of property markets, administrative procedures, client needs analysis, and relationship management. I am now looking to broaden my expertise through an apprenticeship in wealth management, with a particular interest in supporting clients in building, managing, and optimizing their financial and real estate assets.

responsibilities: Assisted with luxury real estate transactions and client advisory.
Supported property prospecting, client follow-up, and mandate preparation.
Participated in property visits for high-end clients.
Developed knowledge of the luxury real estate market and premium client expectations.
Assisted with property presentation, valuation support, and administrative file management.
Strengthened commercial, negotiation, and client relationship skills in a professional agency environment.
Conducted commercial prospecting, including property searches, mandate acquisition, and client relationship management.
Prepared property valuations based on local market analysis in the Cannes area.
Organized property visits and supported real estate negotiations.
Advised clients using strong knowledge of real estate terminology and procedures.
Managed rental files, including drafting and signing leases, file follow-up, and client support.
Used professional real estate software and advertising platforms.
Applied knowledge of real estate law, regulations, and property diagnostics.
Welcomed and advised clients in a professional banking environment.
Supported client projects and assisted with financial planning requests.
Prepared, analyzed, and presented financing proposals.
Managed client files, documents, and administrative procedures.
Used technical banking software and professional tools.
Applied commercial techniques to support client needs and business objectives.
Developed an understanding of banking services, financing solutions, and customer relationship management.
Developed proficiency in architectural and technical terminology.
Assisted with construction project management and coordination.
Used architectural software such as AutoCAD and SketchUp.
Gained knowledge of construction standards and urban planning regulations.
Supported project planning while respecting timelines and schedules.

education.degree: BTS in Luxury Real Estate Professions

education.institution: École Nationale Supérieure d’Architecture Paris-La Villette

skills: Strong customer service and reception skills.
Real estate market analysis and property valuation.
Understanding of real estate transactions, leases, and administrative procedures.
Knowledge of banking services and financing proposals.
Ability to analyze client needs and provide tailored support.
Strong interest in wealth management, patrimonial advisory, and asset optimization.
Professional communication with demanding and high-end clients.
File management, document preparation, and administrative follow-up.
Proficiency in architectural, real estate, and professional software tools.
